nasb.text: The Lord has rejected all my strong men In my midst; He has called an appointed time against me To crush my young men; The Lord has trodden as in a wine press The virgin daughter of Judah.

esv.text: “The Lord rejected all my mighty men in my midst; he summoned an assembly against me to crush my young men; the Lord has trodden as in a winepress the virgin daughter of Judah.

cnv.text: 主丟棄我中間的所有勇士； 他招聚了一大群人來攻擊我，要打碎我的青年人。 主踐踏猶大女兒中的處女，像踐踏壓酒池一樣。

ccb.text: “主藐视我所有的勇士， 召集军队攻击我， 打垮我的青年。 主践踏犹大人， 如同在榨酒池踩踏。
